headline: What's going on in today's session: dow jones movers
summary: Join us in exploring the top gainers and losers within the dow jones index one hour before the close of the markets on Monday as we examine the latest happenings in today's session.

headline: MIT bullish on its Initiative for New Manufacturing at the one-year mark
summary: The group has been funding research projects, touring factories and piloting workforce development programs. Its three co-directors shared highlights during recent events in Boston and Cambridge.

headline: 2 Unpopular Stocks That Should Get More Attention and 1 We Question
summary: When Wall Street turns bearish on a stock, it’s worth paying attention. These calls stand out because analysts rarely issue grim ratings on companies for fear their firms will lose out in other business lines such as M&A advisory.

raw.headline: 2 Unpopular Stocks That Should Get More Attention and 1 We Question

headline: How The Amgen (AMGN) Story Is Evolving As Rare Disease Upside Meets Valuation Caution
summary: Amgen's fair value estimate has been nudged from US$349.66 to US$352.23 per share, a small move that still matters if you are tracking entry points and valuation ranges. Around that level, analysts are split, with some using higher targets such as US$427 on the back of rare disease and pipeline assets, while others sit closer to US$350 and stress that recent gains already price in a lot of the good news. Read on to see how to interpret these shifting targets and keep up with the evolving...
